models.name: workday_employee_skills_development
models.description: Workday employee skills and competency development tracking linked to training activities. This table provides deeper insights into skill acquisition, proficiency levels, and career development impact of training programs.

properties.description: Primary key identifier for the skills development record

relationship.description: Primary foreign key relationship to csod_training_records.id - establishes the core employee connection between training activities and skill development outcomes

properties.description: Employee identifier matching CSOD user_id for cross-reference
Full name of the employee

relationship.description: Hierarchical relationship to workday_employee_skills_development.employee_id - enables manager-employee hierarchy analysis within skills development

properties.description: Manager's employee ID

relationship.description: Reference relationship to csod_training_records.manager_name - enables consistent manager-level analysis across training completion and skill development systems

properties.description: Name of the employee's direct manager
Business division matching CSOD division for alignment

relationship.description: Reference relationship to csod_training_records.division - enables cross-system division-level analysis of training effectiveness and skill development outcomes

properties.description: Current job title of the employee
Career level (e.g., Individual Contributor, Senior, Lead, Manager)
Employee's hire date for tenure analysis
Name of the specific skill being developed
Category of skill (Technical, Leadership, Compliance, Soft Skills)
Competency framework this skill belongs to
Skill proficiency level before training (1-5 scale)
Skill proficiency level after training completion (1-5 scale)
Target proficiency level for the role (1-5 scale)
Criticality of skill for role (Critical, Important, Beneficial)

relationship.description: Foreign key relationship to training_skill_mapping.curriculum_id - links skill development to specific training curricula through bridge table

properties.description: ID linking to CSOD curriculum that developed this skill

relationship.description: Foreign key relationship to csod_training_records.curriculum_title - directly connects skill development outcomes to the training programs that produced them

properties.description: Title of training curriculum from CSOD
Date when skill proficiency was assessed
Method used to assess skill (Self-Assessment, Manager Review, Certification, Practical Test)
Certification or credential earned through training
Date when certification expires
Cost center for training expense allocation
Cost associated with the training program
Latest performance rating (1-5 scale)
Associated career development plan
Role in succession planning this skill supports
Timestamp when the record was created
Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: proficiency_improvement
columns.expression: CASE WHEN post_training_proficiency IS NOT NULL AND pre_training_proficiency IS NOT NULL THEN post_training_proficiency - pre_training_proficiency ELSE 0 END

properties.description: Improvement in proficiency level after training

columns.name: target_gap
columns.expression: CASE WHEN target_proficiency IS NOT NULL AND post_training_proficiency IS NOT NULL THEN target_proficiency - post_training_proficiency ELSE NULL END

properties.description: Gap remaining to reach target proficiency

columns.name: is_skill_proficient
columns.expression: CASE WHEN post_training_proficiency >= target_proficiency THEN true ELSE false END

properties.description: Whether employee has reached target proficiency

columns.name: certification_status
columns.expression: CASE WHEN certification_expiry_date IS NULL THEN 'No Certification' WHEN certification_expiry_date > CURRENT_DATE THEN 'Active' WHEN certification_expiry_date <= CURRENT_DATE THEN 'Expired' END

properties.description: Current status of certification
Employee tenure in months

columns.name: roi_indicator
columns.expression: CASE WHEN training_cost > 0 AND proficiency_improvement > 0 THEN proficiency_improvement / training_cost * 1000 ELSE 0 END

properties.description: Simple ROI indicator (proficiency improvement per $1000 spent)
Comprehensive skills and competency development tracking linked to training activities
properties.queryPatterns: ["Filter by skillCategory (Technical, Leadership, Compliance, Soft Skills) for skill analysis", "Filter by competencyFramework for framework-based reporting", "Join with csod_training_records via employee_id to link training to skill outcomes", "Filter by skillCriticality (Critical, Important, Beneficial) for role analysis", "Group by skillName to analyze skill development patterns", "Filter by isSkillProficient to find employees who reached target proficiency", "Calculate proficiencyImprovement to measure training effectiveness", "Filter by certificationStatus (Active, Expired) for certification tracking"]
properties.useCases: ["Skills Development Tracking: Monitor employee skill acquisition and proficiency improvements", "Training ROI Analysis: Measure training effectiveness through proficiency improvements", "Skills Gap Analysis: Identify gaps between current and target proficiency levels", "Certification Management: Track certification status and expiry dates", "Career Development: Support career development planning through skill tracking", "Cross-System Integration: Link Workday skill development with CSOD training records", "Performance Analytics: Analyze skill development impact on performance ratings", "Succession Planning: Track skills supporting succession plan roles"]

measure.name: skills_meeting_target
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_skill_proficient = true THEN 1 END)

measure.name: target_achievement_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_skill_proficient = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

properties.description: Core metrics for skills development and proficiency tracking

measure.name: critical_skills_gaps
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN skill_criticality = 'Critical' AND target_gap > 0 THEN 1 END)

measure.name: employees_with_gaps
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN target_gap > 0 THEN employee_id END)

properties.description: Analysis of skill gaps and competency requirements
Return on investment analysis for training programs

measure.name: ready_candidates
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_skill_proficient = true THEN employee_id END)

measure.name: succession_readiness_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_skill_proficient = true THEN employee_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id)

properties.description: Metrics for succession planning and leadership development readiness
Track skill proficiency improvements over quarters

measure.name: annual_certifications
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN certification_earned IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)

properties.description: Track certification achievements year over year

views.name: skills_gap_priority_matrix
views.statement: SELECT skill_name, skill_category, skill_criticality, COUNT(*) as employees_with_gap, AVG(target_gap) as avg_gap, COUNT(DISTINCT division) as divisions_affected FROM workday_employee_skills_development WHERE target_gap > 0 GROUP BY skill_name, skill_category, skill_criticality ORDER BY CASE skill_criticality WHEN 'Critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'Important' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, avg_gap DESC

properties.description: Priority matrix for addressing skill gaps based on criticality and impact

views.name: high_performing_development_programs
views.statement: SELECT training_curriculum_title, skill_category, COUNT(*) as participants, AVG(proficiency_improvement) as avg_improvement, AVG(roi_indicator) as avg_roi, SUM(training_cost) as total_investment FROM workday_employee_skills_development WHERE proficiency_improvement > 0 GROUP BY training_curriculum_title, skill_category HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg_improvement DESC, avg_roi DESC

properties.description: Training programs with highest skill development impact

views.name: certification_expiry_alert
views.statement: SELECT employee_name, division, certification_earned, certification_expiry_date, DATEDIFF(day, CURRENT_DATE, certification_expiry_date) as days_until_expiry FROM workday_employee_skills_development WHERE certification_expiry_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND DATEADD(month, 3, CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY certification_expiry_date

properties.description: Certifications expiring in the next 3 months

views.name: division_competency_dashboard
views.statement: SELECT division, competency_framework, COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) as employees, AVG(post_training_proficiency) as avg_proficiency, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_skill_proficient = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as proficiency_rate FROM workday_employee_skills_development GROUP BY division, competency_framework ORDER BY division, proficiency_rate DESC

properties.description: Competency overview by division and framework

views.name: succession_pipeline_readiness
views.statement: SELECT succession_plan_role, COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) as candidates, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_skill_proficient = true THEN employee_id END) as ready_candidates, AVG(performance_rating) as avg_performance, COUNT(CASE WHEN certification_status = 'Active' THEN 1 END) as active_certifications FROM workday_employee_skills_development WHERE succession_plan_role IS NOT NULL GROUP BY succession_plan_role ORDER BY ready_candidates DESC

properties.description: Readiness assessment for succession planning roles
Categories of skills for development tracking
5-point scale for skill proficiency assessment
Criticality levels for skills in relation to job roles
Methods used for skill proficiency assessment
